author: ankitchouhan1020
description: Browse all notes from the sidebar with excerpts, modified dates, search, quick create, and the File Explorer context menu. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Ankit Chouhan
manifest.description: Browse all notes from the sidebar with excerpts, modified dates, search, quick create, and the File Explorer context menu.
manifest.name: Papertrail

name: Papertrail

releases.author: ankitchouhan1020
releases.description:
## Fixes

- Remove invalid `styles` field from manifest (Obsidian loads `styles.css` automatically)
- Raise `minAppVersion` to 1.7.2 to match `workspace.revealLeaf()` usage

These changes address the failed Obsidian Community Plugin automated review for 1.2.0.

releases.author: ankitchouhan1020
releases.description:
## What's new

### UX
- Recent edits now show a friendly relative timestamp: "Just now", "5 minutes ago", "3 hours ago", "Yesterday", "3 days ago". Anything ≥ 7 days old falls back to the existing "9 May 2026" absolute format. A 60s tick keeps the labels fresh while the panel sits open.
- Heavier list titles (`bold 700`), slightly more breathing room around cards, and excerpt text scaled up to match title size for a calmer read.

### Compatibility with Obsidian community-plugin guidelines
- DOM building no longer uses `innerHTML`; search-mark highlights are constructed via `createEl("mark", …)` + text nodes through a new `applyHighlightSegmentsTo` helper.
- All inline `element.style.*` layout has been moved to CSS classes; the search/default rows now toggle via an `is-search-mode` state class on the chrome footer.
- Async View hooks (`onOpen`, `onClose`) and pipeline functions no longer carry `async` without an `await`.
- Configuration folder is read from `Vault.configDir` instead of a hard-coded \`.obsidian\` path.
- Settings tab uses sentence-case copy and removes the manual `<h2>` heading.

### Commands
- IDs and names no longer include the plugin prefix:
  - `Open Papertrail` → **Open list**
  - `Papertrail: Open next note in list` → **Open next note in list**
  - `Papertrail: Open previous note in list` → **Open previous note in list**
- Default hotkeys removed. Bind whatever you like under Settings → Hotkeys. If you previously had hotkeys on the old commands, you'll need to rebind them once.

releases.author: ankitchouhan1020
releases.description:
## Papertrail 1.1.0

**List & layout**
- Title stacks above excerpt; shared 3-line cap with stable line measurement (incl. mobile).
- Row dividers via border on each card; no hairline clipping; active row uses a softer highlight and no double rules at selection.

**Typing & chrome**
- Slightly lighter/smaller list text; more space between title and excerpt; footer chrome matches.
- Short enter animation on the Papertrail chrome title when the tab gains focus.

**Navigation**
- Commands **Papertrail: Open previous/next note in list** with default **⌘↑ / ⌘↓** (Ctrl on Windows/Linux). Works while the editor is focused. Change under **Settings → Hotkeys** if needed.

**Manual install:** attach `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from this release into `.obsidian/plugins/papertrail/`.
releases.name: Papertrail 1.1.0

releases.author: ankitchouhan1020
releases.description:
## Papertrail 1.0.3

Developer workflow: **Husky** runs `npm run build` on every commit via **pre-commit**. If the bundle changes and `main.js` is not staged, the commit is blocked so `main.js` stays in sync with `src/main.ts`.

No user-facing plugin behavior changes from 1.0.2.

**Install manually:** attach `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from this release into `.obsidian/plugins/papertrail/`.
releases.name: Papertrail 1.0.3

releases.author: ankitchouhan1020
releases.description:
## Papertrail 1.0.2

- Card grid layout with **104px** rows; title + excerpt share **3 lines** (title first).
- Pinned date row above the divider; scoped CSS; `styles` in `manifest.json`.
- Snippet line budget + layout scheduling in JS; ItemView height fixes for themes.

See repository README for full details.
releases.name: Papertrail 1.0.2

releases.author: ankitchouhan1020
releases.description: Community listing: manifest authorUrl points to author profile. Release tag `1.0.1` (no `v` prefix) per [obsidian-releases](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases) checklist.
releases.name: Papertrail 1.0.1

releases.author: ankitchouhan1020
releases.description:
First public release.

- Sidebar list of all markdown notes (title, excerpt, modified date)
- Footer search and new note
- Right-click menu aligned with File Explorer + file-menu plugins

**Requires Obsidian 1.5.0+** (`minAppVersion` in `manifest.json`).
releases.name: Papertrail 1.0.0
